TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: sipakayni i tusaay a binacadan tu sepatay a slalan ku tatangahan nu sasakamun. u caayay kalecat a binacadan a tu niyazu'. sakasasuayaw nikaydaan masasakamu a dadan nu balucu'. nikalpacawan i Kaliwan atu nikalpacawan i Takubuwan, cacay a lasubu sepat a bataan a mihcaan izaw ku tatusaay a binacadan a tatengilan i Kilaykin lalangawan nu binacadan a dabek i 107 a mihcan 9ay a bulad 23 a demiad. izaw ku sepatay a caay kalecad a mihcaan a tatangahan, tatusaay a binacadan namakayca i niyazuniyazu'ay a tademaw a musakamu. sakacacay a tatangahan: u nanuadidi' mauzip atu hicanan ku lalangawan nu maku. sakatusa a tatangahan: taniyazu', caay kataniyazu' haw? sakatulu a tatangahan: ayzaay atu sakacakatan anucilacila nu niyazu' sakasepat a tatangahan: i ayaw nu sapangangan atu zikud nipangangan nu binacadan a kawaw.
S.PHON: sipakajni i tusaaj a bina ¶adan tu s…ôpataj a sr~…ĺar~…ĺan ku tataŇčańßan nu sasakamun. u ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶at a bina ¶adan a tu nijazu Ē~ °. sakasasuajaw nikajdaan masasakamu a dadan nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. nikar~…ĺpa ¶awan i kar~…ĺiwan atu nikar~…ĺpa ¶awan i takubuwan, ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu s…ôpat a bataan a mińß ¶aan izaw ku tatusaaj a bina ¶adan a tat…ôŇčir~…ĺan i kir~…ĺajkin r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu bina ¶adan a dab…ôk i *** a mińß ¶an *aj a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad. izaw ku s…ôpataj a ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a mińß ¶aan a tataŇčańßan, tatusaaj a bina ¶adan namakaj ¶a i nijazunijazu Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw a musakamu. saka ¶a ¶aj a tataŇčańßan: u nanuadidi Ē~ ° mauzip atu ńßi ¶anan ku r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu maku. sakatusa a tataŇčańßan: tanijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj katanijazu Ē~ ° ńßaw? sakatur~…ĺu a tataŇčańßan: ajzaaj atu saka ¶akatan anu ¶ir~…ĺa ¶ir~…ĺa nu nijazu Ē~ ° sakas…ôpat a tataŇčańßan: i ajaw nu sapaŇčaŇčan atu zikud nipaŇčaŇčan nu bina ¶adan a kawaw.
S.FORM: sipakayni i tusaay a binacadan tu sepatay a slalan ku tatangahan nu sasakamun. u caayay kalecat a binacadan a tu niyazu'. sakasasuayaw nikaydaan masasakamu a dadan nu balucu'. nikalpacawan i Kaliwan atu nikalpacawan i Takubuwan, cacay a lasubu sepat a bataan a mihcaan izaw ku tatusaay a binacadan a tatengilan i Kilaykin lalangawan nu binacadan a dabek i 107 a mihcan 9ay a bulad 23 a demiad. izaw ku sepatay a caay kalecad a mihcaan a tatangahan, tatusaay a binacadan namakayca i niyazuniyazu'ay a tademaw a musakamu. sakacacay a tatangahan: u nanuadidi' mauzip atu hicanan ku lalangawan nu maku. sakatusa a tatangahan: taniyazu', caay kataniyazu' haw? sakatulu a tatangahan: ayzaay atu sakacakatan anucilacila nu niyazu' sakasepat a tatangahan: i ayaw nu sapangangan atu zikud nipangangan nu binacadan a kawaw.
S.PHON: sipakajni i tusaaj a bina ¶adan tu s…ôpataj a sr~…ĺar~…ĺan ku tataŇčańßan nu sasakamun. u ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶at a bina ¶adan a tu nijazu Ē~ °. sakasasuajaw nikajdaan masasakamu a dadan nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. nikar~…ĺpa ¶awan i kar~…ĺiwan atu nikar~…ĺpa ¶awan i takubuwan, ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu s…ôpat a bataan a mińß ¶aan izaw ku tatusaaj a bina ¶adan a tat…ôŇčir~…ĺan i kir~…ĺajkin r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu bina ¶adan a dab…ôk i *** a mińß ¶an *aj a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad. izaw ku s…ôpataj a ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a mińß ¶aan a tataŇčańßan, tatusaaj a bina ¶adan namakaj ¶a i nijazunijazu Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw a musakamu. saka ¶a ¶aj a tataŇčańßan: u nanuadidi Ē~ ° mauzip atu ńßi ¶anan ku r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu maku. sakatusa a tataŇčańßan: tanijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj katanijazu Ē~ ° ńßaw? sakatur~…ĺu a tataŇčańßan: ajzaaj atu saka ¶akatan anu ¶ir~…ĺa ¶ir~…ĺa nu nijazu Ē~ ° sakas…ôpat a tataŇčańßan: i ajaw nu sapaŇčaŇčan atu zikud nipaŇčaŇčan nu bina ¶adan a kawaw.
